chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3301 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 3. For hearing of MA 13739/17 11.01.2018. Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. alongwith P.I Syed Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP, Hyderabad. Affidavit in rejoinder to parawise comments filed by respondent No.2; taken on record. After hearing the learned counsel for the petitioner at some length, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner has already filed application under section 249-A, Cr.P.C in Crime No.251/2017 of P.S Sakrand under section 392 PPC before the learned Judicial Magistrate, Sakrand which is pending for adjudication, therefore, he does not press this petition. In view of the above, this petition stands disposed of alongwith listed application as not pressed. However, the trial court is directed to decide the application under section 249-A, Cr.P.C as early as possible in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
